# Tables

## Simple Table

| Name    | Age | City        |
| ------- | --- | ----------- |
| Alice   | 30  | New York    |
| Bob     | 25  | Los Angeles |
| Charlie | 35  | Chicago     |

## Feature Comparison

| Feature       | Basic | Pro   | Enterprise |
| ------------- | ----- | ----- | ---------- |
| Storage       | 5 GB  | 50 GB | Unlimited  |
| Users         | 1     | 10    | Unlimited  |
| Support       | Email | Phone | Dedicated  |
| Custom Domain | No    | Yes   | Yes        |
